isi.fileNames: 傍にいるけど (But by your side) (Japanese Ver.)
isi.driveFileNames: Kim Hee Jin - 傍にいるけど (But by your side) (Japanese Ver.).mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Kim Hee Jin - 傍にいるけど (But by your side) (Japanese Ver.)

Romanization

夢の中では気づかず
ずっと彷徨うばかりで
おきてしまうわ
おきれない、戻れない
関係
永遠を願った
私の恋だけど
流されている　私の人生
光ってる星　描いておきたかったのよ
傍にいるけど
悲しくなる理由に気付き
ゆっくり音もなく近づく別れが見える
もういいの Good bye
振り向いてささやく言葉
君を愛してる
この瞬間までも

起きれない　戻れない
関係

私の恋だけど
流されてる 私の人生
光ってる星　描いておきたかったのよ
傍にいるけど
悲しくなる理由に気付き
ゆっくり音もなく近づく別れが見える
もういいの Good bye
振り向いてささやく言葉
君を愛してる
この瞬間までも
傍にいるけど
悲しくなる理由に気付き
ゆっくり音もなく近づく別れが見える
もういいの Good bye
過ぎた思い出　手を振るわ
先に振り向くよ
君の為に
君を愛してる
この瞬間までも

isi.lyrics:
Lyric kyuman - Good Night

Romanization

24/7 neon

ttodasi mwol gidaryeo

eotteon pyojeongeul hago geotgo isseo

haruui sijakbuteo

jeongsineopsi seoisseo

imi alsuisseo neoui mureumdo



machi woo gateun goseul dolgo dora

woo maebeon hemaego chaja nan

meoljjeong han cheok neoreul bolttae

hago sipeun mari deo maneunde



good night

good night

good night

oraen kkumeseo neowa

gakkaun sonkkeute

jiwojil gieokgwa

good night

good night

good night



I'll be your heavy silence

eojjeolsu eomneunggeol ara yeah

pyeongbeomhan sarangui eolgul

modu neoro gadeuk chaewo

nogo sipeunde



machi neol cheoeum bwatdeon sunggancheoreom

neol maebeon hemaego chaja nan



itji mothae neoreul bolttae

hago sipeun mari neomu maneunde



good night

good night

good night

oraen kkumeseo neowa

gakkaun sonkkeute

jiwojil gieokgwa

good night

good night

good night

Hangeul

24/7 넌

또다시 뭘 기다려

어떤 표정을 하고 걷고 있어

하루의 시작부터

정신없이 서있어

이미 알수있어 너의 물음도



마치 woo 같은 곳을 돌고 돌아

woo 매번 헤매고 찾아 난

멀쩡 한 척 너를 볼때

하고 싶은 말이 더 많은데



good night

good night

good night

오랜 꿈에서 너와

가까운 손끝에

지워질 기억과

good night

good night

good night



I'll be your heavy silence

어쩔수 없는걸 알아 yeah

평범한 사랑의 얼굴

모두 너로 가득 채워

놓고 싶은데



마치 널 처음 봤던 순간처럼

널 매번 헤매고 찾아 난



잊지 못해 너를 볼때

하고 싶은 말이 너무 많은데



good night

good night

good night

오랜 꿈에서 너와

가까운 손끝에

지워질 기억과

good night

good night

good night

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Heyne - Love in December

Romanization

Good morning, darling
Stay a little while with me
Cause I can still feel your love

Don’t leave the bed, we’re sleepyheads
I won’t get mad
Let’s make our lazy day

I’ll sing you a love song and make you a cup of coffee
Would you play your heart guitar?
We fell in love in December
ppoppohae jwo dalling

Getting bangs can’t solve the problem
But now I know what love can do
Believe in fate, believe in chance
Take my hand
Let’s move our feet and dance

I’ll sing you a love song and make you a cup of coffee
Would you play your heart guitar?
We fell in love in December
ppoppohae jwo dalling

Leave your blue away
ne gyeote isseulge
Darling, nothing really matters
As long as we’re together
geudaeman itdamyeon

I’ll sing you a love song and make you a cup of coffee
Would you play your heart guitar?
We fell in love in December
ppoppohaejwo dalling

I’ll sing you a love song and make you a cup of coffee
Would you play your heart guitar?
We fell in love in December
ppoppohae jwo dalling

ppoppohae jwo dalling

ppoppohae jwo dalling


Hangeul

Don’t leave the bed, we’re sleepyheads

I’ll sing you a love song and make you a cup of coffee
Would you play your heart guitar?
We fell in love in December
뽀뽀해 줘 달링

Getting bangs can’t solve the problem
But now I know what love can do
Believe in fate, believe in chance
Take my hand
Let’s move our feet and dance

I’ll sing you a love song and make you a cup of coffee
Would you play your heart guitar?
We fell in love in December
뽀뽀해 줘 달링

Leave your blue away
네 곁에 있을게
Darling, nothing really matters
As long as we’re together
그대만 있다면

I’ll sing you a love song and make you a cup of coffee
Would you play your heart guitar?
We fell in love in December
뽀뽀해줘 달링

I’ll sing you a love song and make you a cup of coffee

We fell in love in December
뽀뽀해 줘 달링

뽀뽀해 줘 달링

뽀뽀해 줘 달링
